description: Play Build Link defines the Java interfaces used by the Play build plugin to communicate with an embedded Play server during development. It supports application reloading, source lookup for error reporting, project path discovery, forced reloads, and build-provided settings while avoiding Scala-version coupling between the plugin and server.

Play Build Link defines the Java interfaces used by the Play build plugin to communicate with an embedded Play server during development. It supports application reloading, source lookup for error reporting, project path discovery, forced reloads, and build-provided settings while avoiding Scala-version coupling between the plugin and server.
